channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Councillors ask Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor to formally renounce Freedom of the City of London
item.description: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, the former Duke of York, has been invited by the City of London councillors to relinquish his inherited Freedom of the City of London. He received this honour in 2012 due t...

item.title: FG reintegrates 744 former terrorists through rehabilitation programme
item.description: The Federal Government don announce say 744 people wey don involve for terrorism and victims of violent extremism go dey reintegrated into society after dem finish Federal Government’s De-radicalisati...

item.title: Peter Mandelson appointed US ambassador despite failing security vetting
item.description: Reports have emerged that Lord Peter Mandelson was appointed as the UK ambassador to the United States despite failing critical security vetting. The Foreign Office reportedly overruled the recommenda...

item.title: Zaldy Co arrested in Prague; Philippine authorities coordinate his return
item.description: Zaldy Co, a notable figure linked to alleged fraudulent activities, has been arrested in Prague. Philippine authorities are actively coordinating his return to the country to face legal proceedings. T...

item.title: Suspended official admits issuing VIP letters that may have bypassed Ekurhuleni roadblocks
item.description: Suspended Ekurhuleni official Julius Mkhwanazi told the Madlanga Commission that he cannot deny issuing letters suggesting an ongoing relationship between the city and Vusimusi 'Cat' Matlala’s company...

item.title: BJP Leader Kushbu Criticises DMK over Law and Order Issues in Tamil Nadu
item.description: In a media briefing held in Madurai on Thursday, BJP leader Kushbu criticised the ruling DMK party for its alleged failure to maintain law and order in Tamil Nadu. She highlighted a rising concern ove...

item.title: Tanzania strengthens commitment to advanced neurosurgical and specialised healthcare systems
item.description: Tanzania has reaffirmed its determination to strengthen specialised healthcare services, particularly in neurosurgery, as the country hosts the second international conference of the Federation of Neu...

item.title: Artemis II Astronauts Share Experiences from Their Historic Moon Flyby
item.description: The four astronauts of NASA's Artemis II mission, Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch, and Canadian Space Agency astronaut Jeremy Hansen, are speaking publicly for the first time since returni...

item.title: Nairobi Women Form Movement to Support Ruto’s Second Term
item.description: In Nairobi, a new women-led political movement called the 'Two Term Brigade' has been set up to support President William Ruto's bid for re-election. The initiative unites young mothers from all 85 wa...

item.title: Senate committee fines Sakaja, orders arrest for contempt over ignored Nairobi county audit summons
item.description: Nairobi Governor Johnson Sakaja is under fresh pressure after the Senate County Public Accounts Committee imposed a Sh500,000 fine on him and ordered his arrest for contempt of Parliament. The committ...

item.title: Vidyut Jammwal Joins International Cast in 'Street Fighter' Martial Arts Comedy
item.description: The latest trailer for 'Street Fighter', directed by Kitao Sakurai, has been released, showcasing an exciting blend of mixed martial arts action and comedy. The film features an international cast, in...

item.title: Trump Administration Officials Make Bizarre Claims on Paranormal Activity and Health Remedies
item.description: Recent developments in the US political scene have highlighted increasingly erratic behaviour among Donald Trump and his administration. House Democrats have proposed legislation to establish a commis...

item.title: Police confirm abduction of JAMB candidates on Makurdi–Otukpo road, rescue operation ongoing
item.description: On Wednesday night, wahala burst for Benue State as gunmen attack one Benue Links bus wey dey travel from Makurdi go Otukpo. The bus get around eighteen passengers, some of dem young people wey dey go...

item.title: Single mother becomes debt-free and builds a successful career through mysticism
item.description: Lilith Wildwood, a single mother from Nottinghamshire, faced significant financial hardship after her son left home at 18, leaving her £15,000 in debt. Balancing part-time work and parenting, she stru...

item.title: Daicos' Late Surge Seals Collingwood Victory Over Carlton
item.description: Collingwood secured a narrow victory over Carlton in a thrilling AFL match decided by a single kick. Nick Daicos put on a spectacular fourth-quarter performance to lift his side, marking a significant...

item.title: Florida Congressman Criticizes Democrats’ Vote to Limit Military Sales to Israel
item.description: A significant split is emerging within the Democratic Party regarding U.S. military support for Israel. Recently, 40 Senate Democrats voted to block the sale of certain military equipment, including b...

item.title: Orange and Lemons discuss the enduring cultural impact of ‘Pinoy Ako’
item.description: The Filipino band Orange and Lemons recently looked back on the legacy of their iconic song ‘Pinoy Ako,’ more than two decades after it first made waves in the local music scene. Originally released i...

item.title: UK Covid Vaccine Rollout Praised in Inquiry Report, but Concerns Remain
item.description: A recent report from the UK’s Covid inquiry has lauded the rollout of Covid-19 vaccines as an “extraordinary feat,” highlighting its scale and speed. Over 132 million vaccine doses were administered i...

item.title: Researchers Discover Lithium Hidden in Pyrite from Ancient Shale Rocks
item.description: Researchers from West Virginia University have made an unexpected discovery that could reshape the way we source lithium, a critical element for modern batteries. Analyzing middle-Devonian shale sampl...

item.title: Parliament Session Marked by Priyanka Gandhi's Humorous Remark on Amit Shah
item.description: The recent session of the Lok Sabha witnessed a moment of lighthearted banter between Priyanka Gandhi Vadra and Amit Shah, amidst the usual parliamentary proceedings. During the discussion, Priyanka G...
